title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The legendary pirate Whitebeard was defeated!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And they feel the age's frenz flow

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
